reply: Cross-device handoff is underrated. Assigning from mobile only works if the desktop agent keeps context and exposes progress clearly.
page_title: (3) X 上的 Hasan Toor：“TRAE SOLO Mobile is here, and it changes how AI coding works. the killer feature isn't the mobile app itself. it's the cross-device handoff. assign a Cloud task from your phone. open the desktop or web app. the agent is already running, with full context, ready to ship.” / X
